allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\nvm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvs", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Volta", "$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm_multishells", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\pnpm", "$env:ProgramFiles\\Volta"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "EXISTS: $p" } }; Get-Command node, npm, fnm, volta, nvm, bun, deno -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source)
PowerShell(fnm env --shell power-shell | Out-String | Invoke-Expression; npm install)
PowerShell(fnm env --shell power-shell | Out-String | Invoke-Expression; npm run check)
PowerShell(fnm env --shell power-shell | Out-String | Invoke-Expression; npm run check; if \($?\) { npm run build })
PowerShell(fnm env --shell power-shell | Out-String | Invoke-Expression; Copy-Item .dev.vars.example .dev.vars; npx wrangler d1 migrations apply imposter-db --local)
PowerShell(fnm env --shell power-shell | Out-String | Invoke-Expression; npm run dev)
PowerShell(fnm env --shell power-shell | Out-String | Invoke-Expression; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .wrangler\\state; npx wrangler d1 migrations apply imposter-db --local; npm run check)

PowerShell(fnm env --shell power-shell | Out-String | Invoke-Expression; npx wrangler d1 execute imposter-db --local --command "SELECT c.id, c.slug, c.emoji, COALESCE\(t.name, tf.name, c.slug\) AS name, COUNT\(w.id\) AS wordCount FROM categories c LEFT JOIN category_translations t ON t.category_id = c.id AND t.locale = 'es' LEFT JOIN category_translations tf ON tf.category_id = c.id AND tf.locale = 'en' LEFT JOIN words w ON w.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY name")
PowerShell(fnm env --shell power-shell | Out-String | Invoke-Expression; npm run build)
PowerShell(fnm env --shell power-shell | Out-String | Invoke-Expression; npx wrangler d1 migrations apply imposter-db --local; npm run check)
